memoryArtifacts.headline: Park Hall
memoryArtifacts.description: Descent: Sir John Botetourt, kt. sold 1373 to Sir Henry de Arden (d. c.1400), kt.; to son, Sir Ralph Arden (d. 1420), kt.; to son, Robert de Arden (d. 1452); to son, Walter Arden (d. 1502); to son, Sir John Arden (d. 1526), kt.; to son, Thomas Arden (d. 1563); to grandson, Edward Arden (d. 1583); forfeited to Crown and granted 1586 to Edward Darcy but in 1609 surrendered and returned to Robert Arden (d. 1635); to grandson, Robert Arden (d. 1643); to four sisters, from whom it was bought up by the husband of Godith Arden, Sir Herbert Price (fl. 1664); to son, John Price (fl. 1704); sold 1704 to John Bridgeman of Castle Bromwich Hall, with which it descended thereafter.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote於1469年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾維爾高特時，他的父親Walter De Arden28歲，母親Eleanor Hampden29歲。他於1494年與Jane Creyke在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾維爾高特結婚。他去世於1546年在他的家鄉享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: Arden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, either from the district of Arden in Warwickshire or from Arden in Bredbury (Cheshire). The first placename is thought to be derived from a Celtic word meaning ‘high place’, cognate with Ardennes, the name of a forested region on the borders between northeastern France and eastern Belgium. The second derives from Old English hēah ‘high’ + worthign ‘enclosed settlement’.

variants.name: Harden
meanings: English: variant of Arden with prosthetic H-.

English: habitational name, either from Haredene Wood in East Tisbury (Wiltshire), or from Haredon (in Ugborough, Devon). The first placename probably derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ + denu ‘valley’. The second is from Old English hara + dūn ‘hare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote was born in 1469, in Wilmcote, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter De Arden, was 28 and his mother, Eleanor Hampden, was 29. He married Jane Creyke in 1494, in Wilmcote, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1546, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote è nato il nel 1469 nel Wilmcote, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter De Arden, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Hampden, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Jane Creyke nel 1494, nel Wilmcote, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1546, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ko.Park Hall, Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 카스틀 브롬위치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote(이)가 1469년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 윌컷에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter De Arden(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Hampden(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 윌컷에서 Jane Creyke(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1546년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote nasceu em 1469, em Wilmcote, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter De Arden, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Hampden, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Creyke em 1494, em Wilmcote, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1546, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.Park Hall, Castle Bromwich, Warwickshire: кастл бромвич, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote родился в 1469 г. в местности уилмакот, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter De Arden было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Hampden, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Creyke в 1494 г. в местности уилмакот, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1546 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Arden of Wilmcote nació en 1469, en Wilmcote, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter De Arden, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Eleanor Hampden, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Jane Creyke en 1494, en Wilmcote, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1546, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
